recommended_actions: Confirm criticality tiering and substitutability with the business owner and reflect it in the vendor inventory.
Refresh the financial-condition review; route vendor financials to the financial-spreading-assistant. Factual solvency indicators only, not investment advice.
These are recommendations and evidence for the accountable third-party-risk committee to adjudicate; no vendor decision has been made.
disclaimer: Assessment evidence and recommendations only; not an approval, rejection, or risk-acceptance decision. Human adjudication and sign-off are required before any onboarding, renewal, termination, or system-of-record change.
narrative: Third-party risk assessment of vendor LedgerBridge Payments (V-5590) as of 2026-07-15 under a tightened config (high_dimension_count=2). Two dimensions are High (criticality, financial condition) and none is Critical; the highest dimension severity is High. Because the deployment escalates a composite to Critical at two or more High dimensions, the suggested risk tier is Critical. Each material finding carries cited evidence and a remediation recommendation for the accountable third-party-risk committee to weigh. This output presents evidence and recommendations; it does not decide vendor status.
notes: Bands and the composite tier derive from the versioned config; the high_dimension_count threshold is 2 in this pack and is applied identically by the scoring engine and the output tie-out screen.
